item.title: What is the bonus history of Biogen Pharma?
item.description: Biogen Pharma recently announced a bonus issue at a ratio of 1:6, with an ex-date and record date set for May 15, 2026. Shareholders will receive one additional share for every six shares held. Time: Apr 17 2026 11:00 PM IST
